name: Butter Cream Ribbon Fudge Cake
recipeInstructions:
Butter Cream Ribbon: Combine cream cheese, egg, and sugar in a medium mixing bowl. Beat at high speed until smooth. Gradually add milk and remaining ingredients, beating well.
FUDGE CAKE: Place chocolate squares in the top of a double boiler. Bring water to boil. Reduce heat to low and cook until chocolate melts, stirring occasionally. Remove from heat and let cool. Cream butter; gradually add sugar, beating well at medium speed. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition. Combine flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt; stir well. Alternately add flour mixture and milk to the creamed mix, beginning and ending with flour. Mix after each addition. Stir in melted chocolate and vanilla. Spread half of chocolate batter in a greased and floured 9x13-inch pan. Spoon reserved cream cheese mixture evenly over chocolate batter. Top with remaining chocolate batter. Bake at 350°F for 55-60 minutes or until tested done. Let cool completely in pan on wire rack. Spread frosting over cooled cake.
FUDGE FROSTING: Combine chocolate and butter in the top of a double boiler. Bring water to a boil. Reduce heat to low and cook until chocolate and butter melt, stirring occasionally. Remove from heat and let cool.
